nasb.text: “You shall not see your countryman’s ox or his sheep straying away, and pay no attention to them; you shall certainly bring them back to your countryman.

esv.text: “You shall not see your brother’s ox or his sheep going astray and ignore them. You shall take them back to your brother.

cnv.text: “如果你看見你兄弟的牛或羊走迷了，你不可不理，總要把牠們牽回你的兄弟那裡。

ccb.text: “如果你们看见同胞的牛或羊走迷了路，不可视而不见，要把它带回去交给主人。
